localizations.title: Insert Coin
localizations.hiddenObject_2: The lianas in the level 1 crevasse are abnormally entangled.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Don't you see anything on the metal hinges of this chest?
localizations.code_2484: You dodge the shots and find again the trail of the princess through this labyrinth.
localizations.code_5848: The invaders flee, moving sideways! The path is clear.
localizations.code_5938: Strange lights spring from the machine and time seems to have come to a halt. Suddenly, you feel seized by the screen and land in the middle of a luxuriant jungle.
localizations.code_2449: You wend your way to the ladder.
localizations.hint_5_first: Something is hiding in this underground. The machine of the helmet will reveal it to you.
localizations.hint_5: The number turned red. What can you combine it with to get an extra life?
localizations.hint_7: Careful! Somebody could slip on this banana peel.
localizations.hint_9: The controller symbol enables you to use your helmet! To find a path, you need to avoid the shots. Each ladder or passageway you take provides you with a piece of the code.
localizations.hint_10: Use this coin to start a SUPERBOY game.
localizations.hint_12: This huge gorilla has 3 lives. You don't want to fight it with your bare hands. You will need a weapon to defeat it.
localizations.hint_15_first: Your helmet headlamp could light the corner of the room.
localizations.hint_15: Start machine 39, then scan this card with your phone. Don't you notice anything?
localizations.hint_17: Strike three times the gorilla with your sword.
localizations.hint_21: The robot's weak point: don't let it slide foolishly.
localizations.hint_23_first: Covering yourself with a cardboard box will shield you from the laser beams.
localizations.hint_23: Place card 98 on top of this card so that all lasers are continuous. What patterns do the lasers form on both sides of the cardboard box?
localizations.hint_24_first: Take cards H, I, T and S. This boss is too strong, you must cheat so you need the cheat code card.
localizations.hint_24: The numbers above KO on cards H, I, T, and S are the fight countdown. As do the Life points' yellow bars. Both give you the order in which you need to strike.
localizations.hint_34: Unfortunately, you don't jump high enough to see the enemies.
localizations.hint_35: This wall is less solid than it seems, and you could get rid of it. A good blast should do the trick.
localizations.hint_37: Should all center blocks fall, what number will they form?
localizations.hint_38: Who do you want to strike with this beautiful sword? And, specifically, how many times?
localizations.hint_39: Place your device right above the card you want to illuminate.
localizations.hint_41: You will find a ship at Level 5. One of the ladders on Level 4 will lead you to it.
localizations.hint_45: This small spring can make you jump really high. Just make sure you use it at the right Level.
localizations.hint_47: This ship is fit for deep space. It will be useful after Level 7.
localizations.hint_51: There is nothing to blow to pieces before Level 2.
localizations.hint_60: To use the helmet, operate your device camera above a card with the controller symbol.
localizations.hint_66: The top of the robot is too resistant, you should aim lower.
localizations.hint_69: There are different ways of dying in a game: get squashed by an enemy, burned by lasers, eaten by a monster… Or simply by falling in a hole.
localizations.hint_70: What if you took card 99? And don't forget cards 60 and 69.
localizations.hint_75: You are close to the end, but how can you stop the game?
localizations.hint_77: Aren't these chest metal hinges weird shaped? Turn this chest every which way.
localizations.hint_79: The buildings on card 34 give you the color sequence to use but the invaders have no colors. So, how to determine them?
localizations.hint_82: There is only one way to play a game of SUPERBOY: find a coin in this attic.
localizations.hint_86: Don't forget to take cards 24 and 98.
localizations.hint_92: Only one column of letters will give you the correct CODE.
localizations.hint_95: These three invaders have always baffled you. This poster will be useful later.
localizations.hint_96: Only one green pipe will lead you to the exit. Try to determine exactly where you fell from!
localizations.hint_98_first: This cardboard box will shield you from the lasers at Level 5.
localizations.hint_98: Place this card on top of the Level 5 card. What pattern do the lasers form on all sides of the card?
localizations.hint_99: Don't forget to take cards 12, 45 and 51. Did you notice the hidden number in the vines?
localizations.answer_hint_5: Use the life potion (69) with this Game Over? card (5) to continue playing!
localizations.answer_hint_10: To start the game, insert a coin in the SUPERBOY console. Combine the coin (10) with the console (82).
localizations.answer_hint_15: Move your device camera over the two crates, then move a bit higher, you'll see a number appear.
localizations.answer_hint_21: Slipping on a banana peel, is a classis!  Combine the Mechanister's legs (21)  with the banana (7).
localizations.answer_hint_23: The lasers create a 4 on the left side of the cardboard box, and a 7 on the right side.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Fortunately, you've got a portable spring. Combine the Level 7 card (34) with the portable spring (45) to reach the correct height.
localizations.answer_hint_38: Combine the gorilla (12) with the sword (5). However, you need to use the sword three times to remove the three lives : 3 x 5 = 15.
localizations.answer_hint_75: Press the pause button in the app.
localizations.answer_hint_77: When you turn the card counterclockwise once, this chest's metal hinges form number 38.
localizations.answer_hint_79: The poster indicates to which house each invader corresponds. The number of invaders in each color, in the order of the houses, gives you each digit of the code.
localizations.answer_hint_82: To start the game, insert a coin in the SUPERBOY console. Combine the coin (10) with the console (82).
localizations.answer_hint_92: The word CODE is written from top to bottom in the 3rd column of letters. The matching code is therefore found in the the third column of numbers.
localizations.answer_hint_96: Place card 96 below card 99, using the fall as a guide. Now, you can notice there is one pipe underground aligned with another one above. That's your exit, add the numbers together!
localizations.machine_26: Your powerful combos bring down your enemy, but how did you manage? Discard the cheat code card.
localizations.machine_90: You have neutralized the ship and freed Marion from Wolfix's clutches.
localizations.event_2449: There is a secret passage at Level 4.
localizations.event_2484: Do not omit to follow the princess' trail at Level 4.
localizations.machine_26_error_1: It is too early for this strike… Try the other way around.
localizations.machine_26_error_2: It is not the right moment for this strike. The number above KO will help you find the correct order.
localizations.machine_26_error_3: If you wish to fight someone, you need to know the correct hit sequence.
localizations.machine_26_hint_1: The number above KO is the fight countdown. It shows you the order in which you have to strike. You will need the cheat code card to know what buttons to press.
localizations.machine_26_hint_2: YELLOW then TOP, PURPLE then YELLOW, PURPLE then PURPLE, GREEN then PINK then GREEN.
localizations.machine39_title: You turn the helmet's headlamp on.
localizations.machine_90_title: How many players board this ship?
